description: Generate a country briefing for a named country: capital, region, languages, currency, and a live GBP exchange rate. Includes disambiguation when the name matches multiple countries, geocoding of the capital city (chained from the country lookup), and a conditional branch that skips the exchange rate step for GBP countries.

steps.name: disambiguate_country
steps.prompt: Multiple countries matched — please choose one:

steps.name: print_output_rate
print_output_gbp
